scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names api,web --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names api,web,customer,operator --prefix-colors cyan,magenta,green,yellow "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm exec --workspace=apps/mobile-customer -- expo start --web --port 8081" "npm exec --workspace=apps/mobile-operator -- expo start --web --port 8082"
scripts.lint:mobile: npm run lint --workspace=apps/mobile-customer && npm run lint --workspace=apps/mobile-operator
scripts.check: npm run build:api && npm run build:web && npm run lint:mobile
